services.name: Seeds Supply
services.description: Premium quality certified seeds for all major crops including paddy, wheat, jowar, sunflower, and vegetables.

services.name: Fertilizers
services.description: Wide range of organic and chemical fertilizers to boost soil health and maximize crop yield.

services.name: Pesticides
services.description: Effective and safe pesticides, herbicides, and fungicides to protect your crops from pests and diseases.

services.name: Farming Consultation
services.description: Expert guidance from experienced agronomists on crop selection, soil management, and modern farming techniques.

services.name: Agricultural Tools
services.description: Quality farming tools and equipment to make your agricultural work easier and more efficient.

services.name: Soil Testing
services.description: Professional soil testing services to understand your soil composition and get personalized fertilizer recommendations.

products.name: Grapes (Angur)
products.uses: Thompson Seedless & Sharad Seedless varieties. Ideal for Karnataka climate. High market demand. Drip irrigation recommended. Harvest in 90–100 days.

products.name: Pomegranate (Dalimb)
products.uses: Bhagwa variety — deep red arils, high juice content. Drought tolerant. Suitable for dry regions of Karnataka. Excellent export quality.

products.name: Corn / Maize (Makka)
products.uses: Hybrid maize for grain and fodder. High-yielding variety. Suitable for Kharif & Rabi seasons. Grows well in red and black soils of Karnataka.

products.name: Wheat (Godi)
products.uses: GW-322 & HD-2781 varieties. Best for Rabi season. Requires well-drained loamy soil. High protein content, ideal for flour production.

products.name: Sorghum (Jowar)
products.uses: M-35-1 & CSV-15 varieties. Drought resistant. Dual purpose — grain and fodder. Major crop of North Karnataka. Grows in black cotton soil.

products.name: Pigeon Pea (Tur Dal)
products.uses: ICPL-87119 (Asha) variety. High protein pulse crop. Drought tolerant. Fixes atmospheric nitrogen. Ideal intercrop with cotton and sorghum.

products.name: Chickpea (Chana)
products.uses: JG-11 & Vikas varieties. Rabi season crop. Rich in protein. Grows well in black and red soils. Low water requirement. High market value.

products.name: Hybrid Paddy Seeds
products.uses: High-yield paddy variety suitable for Karnataka soil. Resistant to blast disease. Ideal for Kharif season.

products.name: Sunflower Seeds
products.uses: Oil-rich sunflower seeds for commercial farming. Drought tolerant and high oil content variety.

products.name: Tomato Hybrid Seeds
products.uses: High-yielding hybrid tomato variety. Disease resistant, suitable for open field and greenhouse farming.

products.name: Urea Fertilizer
products.uses: Nitrogen-rich fertilizer for boosting vegetative growth. Apply during early crop stages for best results.

products.name: DAP Fertilizer
products.uses: Di-Ammonium Phosphate for root development and flowering. Best applied at sowing time.

products.name: Organic Compost
products.uses: Natural organic compost to improve soil structure, water retention and microbial activity.

products.name: Chlorpyrifos
products.uses: Broad-spectrum insecticide for controlling stem borers, aphids and soil insects in paddy and cotton.

products.name: Mancozeb Fungicide
products.uses: Protective fungicide for controlling blight, rust and downy mildew in vegetables and field crops.

products.name: Hand Sprayer Pump
products.uses: 16-litre capacity manual knapsack sprayer for applying pesticides and fertilizers on crops.

company.name: Shree Dharidevar Raith Krushi Seva Kendra
company.tagline: Your Trusted Partner in Agriculture Solutions
company.address: Near Busstand Jatta, Kamamadi, Main Road, Karnataka – 586114, India
company.about: Shree Dharidevar Raith Krushi Seva Kendra is a trusted agricultural service center located in the heart of Jatta, Karnataka. We have been serving the farming community with quality products and expert guidance for over a decade.
company.kannada_name: ಶ್ರೀ ಧಾರಿದೇವರ ರೈತ ಕೃಷಿ ಸೇವಾ ಕೇಂದ್ರ
